instructions.purpose: Fill this file with product candidates that can be mapped into Bath Sommelier catalog.v1.
instructions.scope: For now, collect only bath_salt, bath_item, and body_wash. Hold massage bars, body oils, sauna oils, and standalone essential oils for a later body-care phase.
instructions.unknownValues: Use null when unknown. Use availability: unknown when a listing page exists but stock is unclear.
instructions.copyPolicy: Do not paste medical or therapeutic claims into appCopy. Rewrite as routine-context language.
instructions.marketPolicy: Use listing.sourceUrl only for direct purchase or affiliate-ready product pages. Put reviews, comparison pages, articles, and source documents in sourceNotes.sourceRefs.

ingredientKeyGuide.epsom_salt: Epsom salt or magnesium sulfate bath salt for muscle/recovery routines.
ingredientKeyGuide.carbonated_bath: Carbonated or bicarbonate bath tablets/powder for reset/circulation-style routines.
ingredientKeyGuide.shower_steamer: Aromatherapy shower steamer used only in shower routines.
ingredientKeyGuide.body_wash_relaxing: Relaxing body wash used in shower routines.
ingredientKeyGuide.hinoki_oil: Only use for finished bath/shower products whose main theme is hinoki/cypress. Avoid standalone essential oil in this phase.
ingredientKeyGuide.chamomile_oil: Only use for finished bath/shower products whose main theme is chamomile. Avoid standalone essential oil in this phase.
ingredientKeyGuide.eucalyptus_oil: Only use for finished bath/shower products whose main theme is eucalyptus. Avoid standalone essential oil in this phase.
ingredientKeyGuide.grapefruit_oil: Only use for finished bath/shower products whose main theme is citrus/grapefruit. Avoid standalone essential oil in this phase.

appCopy.summary: 근육 회복 루틴에서 쓰기 쉬운 마그네슘 계열 입욕제
appCopy.editorialFooterHint: 운동 후 회복 루틴의 기본 후보로 검토하기 좋은 제품

safetyReview.pregnancyNote: 전성분 기준 특별 금기 성분 없음. 단, 고온 장시간 입욕은 피하는 카피 필요.

sourceNotes.rawClaimSnapshot: 상품 상세의 효능 문구는 내부 검수용으로만 기록
sourceNotes.reviewNotes: 용량, 옵션형 여부, 공식/병행수입 여부 확인
